## On Loopcraft

x.summary:
## On Loopcraft

One might argue the entire game of the next century is to be able to stack loops as effectively as possible. 

In the early days of each phase, it will be valuable to know when to go **DOWN** a loop when things go wrong (for reliability)… 

but it will probably be more valuable to know how to go **UP** a loop as models improve (for leverage).

If you don’t figure out how to do this, don’t be salty when you lose to those that do.
x.author: swyx

x.title: At Box, we just surveyed 1,640 IT leaders across the US, Japan, and Europe about agentic AI adoption. Many standout find
x.summary:
At Box, we just surveyed 1,640 IT leaders across the US, Japan, and Europe about agentic AI adoption. Many standout findings, but a big one was that the companies that adopted AI the most are planning to grow headcount the most.

Obviously lots of ways you can read that data and variables mixed in, but it’s actually quite intuitive that the companies that become most productive want to (and are able to) reinvest back into the business to keep getting the gains going. 

The narrative of jobs being wiped out assumes that companies will take a fixed approach to what they want to be able for work on. What’s happening in practice is it’s causing companies to want to light up more engineering projects, sell to more customers, automate more processes to give time back, and more. That all leads to more work to be done by people.
x.author: levie

videos.title: How Preply combines AI and human tutors to personalize learning
videos.summary:
What happens when one of the world's largest language-learning platforms combines human expertise with AI?

In this customer story, Preply shares how it's using OpenAI to create more personalized learning experiences for learners around the world—while giving tutors more time to focus on teaching, motivation, and human connection.

Hear from Preply's Co-founder & CTO, Dmytro Voloshyn, Staff Product Manager, Emily Stott, and tutor Michelle Garcia Ramos as they discuss how AI is transforming language learning and helping build a future that is human-led and AI-enabled.

Read the full story: www.openai.com/index/preply
videos.author: OpenAI

videos.title: Build Small with Modal
videos.summary:
As part of the Build Small hackathon we are inviting our partners to share their knowledge on how to get the most out of their platform.

Today we are joined by Modal who will walk us through some use-case for Modal's cloud compute as well as taking questions from the community!
